title: armeria elongata subsp. alpina
intro: Armeria elongata subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Sea Thrift, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Alpine Sea Thrift include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
